name: Marc Goldberg
subject: FWD: Where we stand 100 days out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Our race here in New Hampshire is one of the most competitive in the country. Team, **only grassroots supporters like you can put us over the top.**
Here's the bad news: The latest polls show that Governor Maggie Hassan is neck-and-neck with Trump-supporter Kelly Ayotte. Right-wing groups are outspending us by a huge margin (they've already spent more than $15 million) and are on their way to turning this race into one of the most expensive _ever_.

The future of the Supreme Court is on the line, so your gift really couldn't be more important: **[Please give now, before midnight, to help elect Governor Maggie Hassan and take back the Senate. Grassroots supporters like you will be the difference in this race-- if you give now, we'll send you a free Team Maggie sticker.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd6e1/2a380d31/106cd8d4/fac6dc/1532505027/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNjA3Mjdfc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzMxcG0tbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20160727_sticker?refcode=e20160731pm-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Thanks for stepping in here.

Marc Goldberg
Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Team Maggie
Date: Sun, Jul 31, 2016
Subject: Where we stand 100 days out
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd6e1/2a380d31/106cd8d4/fac6dd/1532505027/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd6e1/2a380d31/106cd8d4/fac6dd/1532505027/VEsF/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Friends -- we're exactly 100 days from Election Day, and here's where we stand in our race that could decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court:
* The most recent polls show Governor Hassan in a **dead heat** with Washington insider Kelly Ayotte.
* Both _Roll Call_ and Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ say our race is **one of the biggest toss-ups** this year.
* We're being **MASSIVELY outspent by right-wing groups** tied to Mitch McConnell and the Koch Brothers -- they've unloaded more than $15 million to defeat Maggie.

The Senate and the future of the Supreme Court are at stake, and New Hampshire could be the most expensive Senate race of 2016. That's why raising every dollar -- every _penny_ -- we can before tonight's monthly fundraising deadline to elect Maggie Hassan is so critical.
**There are 10 hours left until we close the books on July --** **[will you please give $3 or more right now to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court? This goal is important. name: Bill Bryant for Governor
subject: Inlee's attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| [ ](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donor_0731a&n=1)
---
Friend --

Washington doesn’t need any more partisan negativity. We need practical solutions to the challenges confronting kids and families in Washington State. Jay Inslee would disagree with me on this, though. Just look at what his campaign is putting out there.

Inslee's negative ads appear almost 10-1 over his positive ads. Why is Jay so intent on attacking our campaign? Because he has nothing good to say about his own record.

Our campaign, by contrast, aired three positive commercials showing voters how a Bryant Administration would serve Washington. The first ad, “Fresh Air,” shows how I want to bring new leadership to this state. The second ad focuses on education, how kids are being left behind, and what I’d do to make sure every kid has an equal chance to get ahead. The third ad, that we call "Hops,” focuses on my background in agriculture and trade and discusses how essential both are to our state's economy.

We want to reach as many voters as possible with these three positive messages before ballots are due on Tuesday. **Can you help us overcome Jay Inslee’s wave of negative attacks before Election Day?**

**[Contribute $5](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D5&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donor_0731a&n=2) \- [Contribute $30](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D30&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donor_0731a&n=3) \- [Contribute $100](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor%3Famount%3D100&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donor_0731a&n=4) \- [Contribute Other](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fbill-bryant-for-governor&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donor_0731a&n=5)**

Don’t forget to vote and to remind your friends and family to send in their ballots!

**Bill Bryant

** _PS. If you want to watch our positive ads or want to share them just visit[billbryantforgovernor.com/commercials

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. name: Michelle Kleppe, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Join us on Saturday in Woodbridge to get people pumped up about Hillary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| I don't know about you, Peter, but I'm feeling pretty proud to be a Democrat right now.

At our convention last week, we showed how our party embodies diversity, hope, and the desire to come together to problem-solve -- that's a pretty special thing to be part of. Now it’s time for us to head out into our communities and get our neighbors involved, too.

We're gearing up for a weekend of volunteering, taking all this amazing energy and turning it into real action to help Hillary win this election. **Can you join us for a few hours this weekend to help get people fired up to join Team Hillary?**

Here are the details:
**WHAT:** Hillary for Woodbridge Phone Bank
**WHEN:** Saturday, August 6th
12:00 pm - 06:00 pm
**WHERE:** 4349 Ridgewood Center Dr
Woodbridge, VA 22192

We've got fewer than 50 days before the first votes are cast in this election. It's going to fly by, and we need to do everything we can to make sure that folks in your state know what's at stake, and what a Trump presidency would actually mean.

**So let’s kick into high gear. RSVP now for an event in Woodbridge, and let's go!**

Thanks,

Michelle

Michelle Kleppe
National Organizing Director
Hillary for America

subject: three MILLION voter contacts
body:
| Peter -- Last week, Rob was endorsed by the Ohio Conference of Teamsters and the Ohio Fraternal Order of Police. Together with the United Mine Workers, we now have the endorsements of three unions, representing nearly 100,000 hardworking Ohio families, that previously supported Ted Strickland!

Since May of last year, our volunteers and interns have contacted _three million voters_! For more than a year, Team Portman has been knocking on doors and making phone calls in order to help us win in November. This summer alone, we have more than 500 interns helping us across the state.

[](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=3mill_vc_blastb&n=1)

We are working hard every day to make sure that we keep the Ohio Senate seat in Republican hands. Ohio voters have a clear choice in November between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

With a strong team, we know we can win \-- thank you for everything you are doing to ensure victory in November! name: Sami Ghani, RussFeingold.com
subject: It's time for Senator Johnson to denounce Trump
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
The slander and hate that Trump has spewed at the Khan family have no place in our country. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema") Friend, During last week's Democratic National Convention, Khizr Khan and his wife, Ghazala, shared their story with the world: Twelve years ago, their son -- Captain Humayun Khan -- was killed by a car bomb in Iraq. Captain Khan told his soldiers to stand back, and he bravely took ten steps forward toward imminent danger. Captain Khan was posthumously awarded the Purple Heart and Bronze Star for his service to our nation. **It took Donald Trump fewer than 2 4 hours to attack the Khan family, relying on tired, racist stereotypes -- tweeting that Captain Khan's mother, Ghazala, wasn't permitted to speak before the convention because she's a Muslim woman.** All Gold Star families should be honored, no ifs, ands, or buts. The slander and hate that Trump has spewed at the Khan family has no place in our country -- and Republicans across the country have stepped up to do the right thing and denounce Trump's hateful comments. **[Yet, Wisconsin's own Senator Ron Johnson continues to support Trump's campaign, and refuses to denounce him by name. Join me in calling on Senator Johnson to denounce Trump's hateful comments against the Khan family.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema")** Love of our country should always be more important than toeing the party line. Senator Ron Johnson once said he'd pull his support for Trump if he "crosses a line." So, I'm asking Senator Ron Johnson directly: Donald Trump has attacked a Gold Star family who's suffered a profound loss and made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. Senator Johnson, will you pull your support for Donald Trump now? **[Join me in telling Senator Johnson that enough is enough. It's time to do what's right. The line has been crossed: Denounce Donald Trump's hateful attacks on the Khan family.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema")** Arab-Americans are a diverse group. Khizr Khan and I are probably very different people. But we've both felt the pain of being "othered" in a society that fears you because of who you are. It was incredible to listen to Khizr Khan's speech, a moment I'll value for a long time. He stood up for the principles of the country I love, and against the hateful, divisive language of Trump. He gave voice to the concerns and fears of people like me, people who are too often marginalized, and those words were pure and powerful. It made me proud of the work I do. Thanks for standing against hate and division -- and _for_ the ideals Mr. Khan and I hold dear. Sincerely, Sami Ghani
Deputy Digital Content Director | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/denounce-trump?utm_source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&source=ema_2016-08-01_TK&utm_campaign=TK&utm_medium=ema")

body:

---
Friend --

This is it! Ballots must be postmarked by tomorrow.

Right now we’re seeing incredibly low voter turnout, which means every vote is crucial – literally every vote matters more this election because of the low turnout. Turnout statewide right now is at 13.32% - less than half what it was four years ago.

We need to get our supporters voting. We need everyone to stop what they are doing and please email all their friends and family asking them to turn in their ballots. Clicking [**THIS LINK**](mailto:?subject=important&body=Friends%0d%0dElection%20Day%20is%20tomorrow,%20Tuesday,%20August%202nd.%20And%20Bill%20Bryant,%20the%20candidate%20for%20governor%20I'm%20supporting%20needs%20our%20help.%0d%0dVoter%20turnout%20is%20extremely%20low.%20Only%20half%20as%20many%20people%20may%20vote%20this%20year%20as%20did%20four%20years%20ago.%0d%0dHalf%20the%20people%20voting%20means%20your%20vote%20can%20make%20a%20huge%20difference%20in%20this%20election.%20If%20you%20get%20your%20friends%20and%20family%20to%20vote,%20we%20can%20change%20the%20state.%0d%0dI'm%20supporting%20Bill%20because%20I%20think%20he's%20exactly%20what%20our%20state%20needs,%20but%20don%E2%80%99t%20take%20my%20word%20for%20it,%20check%20out%20his%20commercial%20billbryantforgovernor.com/freshair%20or%20his%20website%20billbryantforgovernor.com%0d%0dPlease,%20mail%20your%20ballot%20today,%20before%20it's%20too%20late,%20and%20tell%20your%20friends%20to%20do%20the%20same.%20And%20please%20join%20me%20in%20supporting%20Bill%20Bryant%20for%20Governor.) opens an email that you can send to everyone in your address book. Please click on the link and encourage your friends to vote. An email from a friend is one of the best ways to get people to vote so don't skip anyone!

Washington needs new leadership - today we can begin to deliver that leadership by working to make sure Bill Bryant is our next Governor.

Matt Donnellan
Political Director, Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you have any questions or comments, [click here](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/contact?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gotv_tomorrow&n=2) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gotv_tomorrow&n=3) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gotv_tomorrow&n=4) or [Twitter](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gotv_tomorrow&n=5).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help make Washington State a better place to learn, to work, to play, and to live.**

Washingtonians for Bryant (R), P.O. Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Don't forget to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Primaries are tomorrow.

VOTE in Washington's Primary
Submit ballots on or before August 2nd
Find info here:
http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI4NzUxMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgwMDc3NTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Dear Friend,

The last few days have crystallized why elections this year are so important.

- Donald Trump disgustingly attacked the mother of a fallen servicemember
- Donald Trump's main Super PAC funder has come to Washington to try to defeat me
- Bill Bryant and his Republican allies are running vicious, false attack ads about me and my record

We need to fight back with our voice, our power, our VOTE.

I can't say this enough: Make sure to vote from the top of the ballot all the way on down for Democrats who share our values by TOMORROW, August 2nd.

Here's what you can do:

1. Click here for more info on voting:
http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI4NzUxMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgwMDc3NTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0
2. Call your friends, neighbors, relatives, and coworkers -- and make sure they vote!
3. Forward this email to your friends to make sure they have the info they need.

I would be honored to have your vote. From the stronger economy we're building to the values of compassion and innovation we've led with, we have so much to be proud of. Especially compared to the hate and violent rhetoric from the Republican leadership.

We have so much left to accomplish for our state -- from education to transportation, healthcare, and beyond. Help us continue to move forward by casting your vote today for me and for all Democrats on the ballot.

The Republicans will have big money from out of state millionaires and billionaires to spend on misleading and false attack ads. We have you. Make sure you send in your ballot or turn it in by TOMORROW, August 2nd.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

MORE INFO: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI4NzUxMwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTgwMDc3NTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0

Help us continue to move forward by casting your vote today for me and for all Democrats on the ballot. The Republicans will have big money from out of state millionaires and billionaires to spend on misleading and false attack ads. We have you. Make sure you send in your ballot or turn it in by TOMORROW, August 2nd. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee MORE INFO:

**FACT CHECK** **_THE REAL BRUCE LISMAN_****, Vol. 1**
“Bruce Lisman is spending millions of dollars to mislead Vermonters with dishonest ads about Phil Scott’s plans, priorities and record. Team Scott thinks it’s time Vermonters knew more about _The Real Bruce Lisman_. This is the first in a series of fact checks we will be issuing over the next week.” – Brittney Wilson, Phil Scott for Vermont Spokeswoman

**_FACT 1: Bruce Lisman HAS Refused to Rule Out Running as an Independent if He Loses Primary ... BECAUSE HE’S NOT A VT REPUBLICAN_**

**In 2014, Lisman floated running for governor as an independent.** Bruce Lisman of Shelburne, a retired Wall Street investment banker and founder of the organization Campaign for Vermont, is considering running for governor, possibly as an independent, but Shawn Shouldice, a spokeswoman for Lisman, said Saturday, ‘He still has no plans.’” (Terri Hallenbeck, “Why a 'Harvard Square urchin' is running as a Republican,” _The Burlington Free Press, 5/5/14)_

**In 2014, Lisman said he did not prefer more Republicans be elected governor.** “Asked whether his gift to the RGA means he’d prefer to see more Republicans elected to governorships in 2014 than Democrats, Lisman said ‘definitely not.’” (Peter Hirschfeld, Vermont Public Radio, 5/2/14)

**As recently as the summer of 2015, Lisman was still considering if he would run for governor with a party affiliation.** “The founder of Campaign for Vermont says he is seriously considering a run for governor. ... He says he has not decided if he would run with a party affiliation.” (“Lisman considering run for Vt. Governor,” WCAX, 7/17/15)

**In an October 2015 interview, Lisman refused to rule out running as an independent if he lost the Republican primary for governor.** Reporter: “If you lose to Phil Scott are you going to run as an independent.” Lisman: “I’m planning to win the race.” ([WCAX](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a4023b6615&e=19cebfe173), at 2:05, 10/15/15)

**_FACT 2: LISMAN ADMITS HE IS A “LIFELONG DEMOCRAT”_**

**Before running for Governor, Lisman described himself as a lifelong Democrat.** “Lisman describes himself as a lifelong Democrat.” (Joyce Marcel, “Bruce Lisman,” _Vermont Business Magazine_ , October 2010)
**Vermont businessman David Coates called Lisman a “liberal Democrat.”** “But according to David Coates, who has served with Lisman on the boards of National Life and the University of Vermont, ‘This is a man who when he was in New York was a liberal Democrat.’” (Paul Heintz, “Governor Lisman?,” _Seven Days_ , 9/4/13)

**Lisman has a record of donating to national Democrats.** “Lisman's history of political contributions is varied. Since 1990, he's donated $56,400 to federal candidates of all stripes. Recipients have included Tom Daschle, Barack Obama and Bill and Hillary Clinton on the left ...” (Paul Heintz, “Governor Lisman?,” _Seven Days_ , 9/4/13)

**Lisman donated to the campaign of Democrat mayor of Burlington, Miro Weinberger.** “The mayor-elect also received a $350 donation from Bruce Lisman, founder of the Campaign for Vermont political action committee that has been critical of some of Democratic Gov. Peter Shumlin's policies. (Sam Hemingway, “Weinberger sprinted through the wire,” _The Burlington Free Press_ , 3/17/12)
